onset.Description: Onset time of the event in seconds from recording start.

duration.Description: Duration of the event in seconds. A value of zero means that the event is a dirac pulse

sample.Description: Sample index of the event onset (zero-indexing)

mvc_rate.Description: Rate at which the torque changes in percent MVC per second

mvc_level.Description: MVC (maximum voluntary contraction) level at the onset of the event

Levels.linear_isometric_ramp: The isometric torque changes linearly over time with a fixed rate.
Levels.steady_isometric: Steady isometric contraction at a fixed MVC level.
